Duplicate providers for one type. Route duplicates are detected at emission
on effective patterns; see group_dup.txt.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type X struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewX() *X { return &X{} }

//fabrik:provider
func NewX2() *X { return &X{} }

//fabrik:http GET /
func A(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:10:1: multiple providers for type *app/web.X
  help: only one //fabrik:provider per type is supported; first declared at $WORK/web/web.go:7:1
